etymology.interpretation: The character 糸(mì, "silk; thread") represents a pictorial representation of a skein of silk, visually capturing the concept of thread or fiber.

examples.chinese: 她手工制作了一条漂亮的丝巾(她手工製作了一條漂亮的絲巾)。
examples.pinyin: Tā shǒugōng zhìzuòle yī tiáo piàoliang de sī jīn.
examples.english: She handcrafted a beautiful silk scarf.

examples.chinese: 这个设计图必须用细糸画出来(這個設計圖必須用細糸畫出來)。
examples.pinyin: Zhège shèjìtú bìxū yòng xì mì huà chūlái.
examples.english: This design drawing must be sketched with fine thread.

examples.chinese: 我们参观了古代的织布技术(我們參觀了古代的織布技術)，对丝绸制作产生了兴趣(對絲綢製作產生了興趣)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen cānguānle gǔdài de zhībù jìshù, duì sīchóu zhìzuò chǎnshēngle xìngqù.
examples.english: We visited ancient weaving techniques and developed an interest in silk production.
